noGoal.title: Set a goal to see your streak
noGoal.body: Finish onboarding with a goal and target date, then your home dashboard will show your streak and mood calendar.

missingGoal.title: Goal not found
missingGoal.body: We could not load your active goal. Try setting a new goal from onboarding.

home.targetDay: Target day — you made it. Celebrate however feels right.

heatmap.title: Mood calendar
heatmap.subtitle: Each square is a day. Color shows how you felt on your last check-in that day.

badges.title: Badges
badges.subtitle: Small wins along the way. Locked badges unlock as you keep showing up.

streak3.name: 3-day streak
streak3.description: Three days in a row. Momentum is building.

streak7.name: 7-day streak
streak7.description: One week of showing up for yourself.

streak30.name: 30-day streak
streak30.description: A full month. That takes real commitment.

total10.name: 10 moments
total10.description: Ten check-ins logged on your journey.

total50.name: 50 moments
total50.description: Fifty memories captured. Your future self will thank you.

home.title: Home
home.placeholder: Your emotion heatmap and streak will live here.

journal.title: Journal
journal.placeholder: Your journal history will live here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.placeholder: Settings and account will live here.

placeholderModal.title: Sample modal
placeholderModal.body: Modal routes are wired on the root stack for future flows.

goalName.title: What is your goal?
goalName.subtitle: One line is enough. You can always refine it later.
goalName.placeholder: e.g. Run a 5K, finish the course, feel calmer

targetDate.title: By when?
targetDate.subtitle: Pick a date that feels motivating, not punishing.

start.title: You are ready
start.subtitle: Here is what we will track together.

permission.title: Camera access
permission.cameraBody: We need the camera so you can capture quick moments on your journey.

capture.noDevice: No camera found on this device.

mood.title: How was today?
mood.subtitle: Tap the mood that fits best. There is no wrong answer.

empty.title: No entries yet
empty.body: When you are ready, capture a short clip or photo. This space will fill with your journey, not pressure.

noGoal.title: Set a goal to begin
noGoal.body: Once you add a goal, your journal entries will show up here.

list.title: Time capsule
list.empty: Record a message to your future self. We will hold it until the day you choose—then nudge you gently to open it.

create.title: New time capsule
create.mediaHint: Capture a short video or photo, or write something instead.
create.textPlaceholder: Write something for your future self
create.captureReady: Got it — we will seal this with your other details.
create.dateMustBeFuture: Choose a time in the future for when this should open.

reveal.title: A message for you
reveal.subtitle: You recorded this for yourself, for a day that might need it.

capsule.title: Your capsule "{{title}}" is ready
capsule.body: Your time capsule is ready — you recorded this for yourself.

permission.rationale: Get a gentle reminder to log a moment for your goal. You can turn this off anytime in system settings.

daily.earlyBody: Whenever you are ready, a short check-in keeps "{{goalName}}" moving forward. No pressure, just space to show up.
daily.midBody: You have been building toward "{{goalName}}". A tiny moment today still counts as progress.
daily.finalStretchBody: We are in the last week before your target for "{{goalName}}". How are you doing today? One honest check-in is enough.
daily.targetDayBody: Today is the day you set for "{{goalName}}". Capture how you feel, whether it is big or quiet. This is your story.
